name: Garden Brain  Learn Grow!
description: GardenBrain is a colorful 3-level kids learning adventure where little gardeners explore the magical world of plants, sunshine, and colors! Journey through the Sunny Meadow, Rainbow Forest, and Magic Garden to identify plants, match colors, and help the sun grow flowers. Features drag-and-drop learning, animated rewards, 3 lives, level progress saving, and a cheerful garden friend guide named Sprout!
instructions: MOUSE Click or drag items to match answers KEYBOARD Number keys 1 ndash 4 to select answers Mobile Tap or drag to interact
